subject: a humanoid figure with serpentine hair wreathed in blue starlight energy, a snake visible beside them, star-shaped creature forms materializing around their hands
suspected_ip: Theros gorgon or enchantress figure — possibly a named Theran character
description: A humanoid figure stands facing the viewer with thick, snake-like locks of hair flowing outward. Brilliant blue magical energy swirls around their hands and torso, forming glowing sparkle-trails and what appear to be ghostly animal outlines — a bird or horse shape is visible in the lower left rendered in starlight. A living snake is clearly visible to the right of the figure, rearing up. The figure's eyes glow with golden-yellow light. The background is a deep night sky scattered with stars. The overall palette is deep blue, indigo, and gold, with the figure's skin visible but in shadow.
foreground: humanoid figure with serpentine hair, blue starlight energy, snake to right, ghostly star-creature forms at hands
emotion: commanding and otherworldly, glowing eyes suggest divine or magical power
